nodes.name: Webhook: New Deal
nodes.notes: Triggered by: (1) GHL workflow when an opportunity hits 'Inventory - Ready to Blast' stage, OR (2) Notion button automation on a deal page. Expected payload fields: deal_id, source (ghl|notion), asset_class, market, price, deal_type, summary_url, address (internal only)

nodes.name: GHL: Fetch Active Buyers
nodes.notes: Uses GHL Private Integration Token (create under Settings → Private Integrations). Env var GHL_LOCATION_ID should be set to the TFS sub-account location ID. For paginated results beyond 100, add a Loop node — skipping that optimization until buyer list exceeds 100 active contacts.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"customFields":[{"id":"JzmuiUCvNJtHiHOeEz90","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.asset_class}}"},{"id":"tAFA5xs5ZS7AG7AgheZw","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.market}}"},{"id":"h1PdpPrgYHfk7WKdEBjp","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.price}}"},{"id":"TENFLNR411SHBOBRzEQX","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.deal_type}}"},{"id":"hGftrRzv5pt24KrNd1sO","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.summary_url}}"},{"id":"hGftrRzv5pt24KrNd1sO","value":"{{$('Filter & Match Buyers').item.json.deal.deal_id}}"}]}

nodes.name: A: Apply deal:new-inventory Tag
nodes.notes: This is what fires GHL WF02 (Deal Match & Send). The tag MUST be applied AFTER the custom fields are written, otherwise WF02 reads stale/empty fields.
